working_on.sprint: Sprint 6 — Channel Integration UI (Facebook OAuth + Zalo OA)
working_on.description: Completed channel management UI: FacebookChannelSection (OAuth flow + multi-page selection), ZaloChannelSection (OAuth connect/disconnect), page.tsx (callback URL parsing + state management). All TSC + ESLint clean.

pending_tasks: Zalo OA: test after user verifies Zalo account
recent_changes: FacebookChannelSection.tsx: NEW — OAuth connect, multi-page selection card UI, disconnect with webhook unsubscribe
ZaloChannelSection.tsx: NEW — OAuth connect/disconnect, status display
page.tsx: MODIFIED — parse URL callback params (?facebook=connected/select_page, ?zalo=connected), fbPendingSession state, clear on refresh
channel.service.ts: MODIFIED — added getFacebookAuthUrl, getZaloAuthUrl, getPendingPages, selectFacebookPage, disconnectZaloOA APIs
Fixed: fbPendingSession remount bug — clear session in onRefresh callback to prevent useEffect re-firing after component remount

uncommitted_summary.summary: Channel management UI complete: Facebook OAuth + multi-page + Zalo OA. 4 files changed/added. TSC + ESLint clean.
